name: @civ/events
description: Single source of truth for event contracts: JSON Schemas, fixtures, contract tests, TS/Python codegen

scripts.gen: npm run gen:ts && npm run gen:py
scripts.gen:py: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('generated/py/civ_events',{recursive:true})" && uvx --from datamodel-code-generator datamodel-codegen --input schemas --input-file-type jsonschema --output generated/py/civ_events --output-model-type pydantic_v2.BaseModel --target-python-version 3.12 --disable-timestamp
